Package i5.cb.workbench

Class ConnectDialog

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.Component
      • java.awt.Container
        • java.awt.Window
          • java.awt.Dialog
            • javax.swing.JDialog
              • i5.cb.workbench.ConnectDialog

  • public class ConnectDialog
extends javax.swing.JDialog

    Class: ConnectDialog for CBIva
    Function: Dialog to make a connection to a ConceptBase-Server
    See Also:
    Dialog, i5.cb.workbench, CBIva, Serialized Form
